# STRAT.025 ? Self-Determination Theory (Deci & Ryan)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** psychological_frameworks
**Domain:** PSYCHOLOGICAL_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Autonomy, competence, relatedness as basic needs; intrinsic vs extrinsic motivation; self-determined action; internalization

## Application
Support autonomy; build competence; foster relatedness; cultivate intrinsic motivation; facilitate internalization; avoid controlling

## Key Values
- Autonomy
- Competence
- Relatedness
- Intrinsic motivation
- Self-determination

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, psychological_frameworks

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
